summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ArivuPro AI student assessment platform after major feature implementation. All backend APIs functional with Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration. Frontend UI fully responsive with proper auth flows, document upload, career advisor, and performance tracking. Mobile responsiveness excellent. Protected routes working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend health check endpoint (/api/health)
Backend root endpoint (/api/) with ArivuPro branding message
CORS headers configuration for cross-origin requests
API validation for missing data (422 status codes)
User registration with new accounts
User login with test credentials (teststudent@test.com)
JWT cookie authentication and session management
Get current user endpoint (/api/auth/me)
Performance tracking endpoint (/api/performance)
Career advisor AI chat (/api/career-advisor) with Claude Sonnet 4.5
User logout and cookie clearing
Protected route access control after logout
Claude Sonnet 4.5 OCR and semantic grading (/api/analyze)
PDF report generation (/api/generate-report)
Landing page loading with ArivuPro branding and tagline
Navigation between landing page and auth page
Auth page form elements (email, password, submit)
Registration form toggle with name and course fields
Login flow with test credentials
Dashboard loading with user info and course badge
Dashboard tabs navigation (Analyze, Performance, Career Advisor)
Upload zones for Question Paper, Answer Key, Answer Script
Single/Batch mode toggle functionality
Batch scripts section appearance in batch mode
Performance tab empty state display
Career advisor chat interface and message sending
AI response display in career advisor
Logout functionality and redirect to landing page
Mobile responsive design (390x844 viewport)
Mobile auth form accessibility
Mobile dashboard navigation and upload zones
Mobile career advisor interface
Protected routes redirect to /auth when not logged in
Dashboard access after successful login
Protected route blocking after logout
